$comment: Normatively defined in AIP spec §7.3.4. This schema describes the /.well-known/aip-registry discovery document.
title: AIP Registry Discovery Document
description: Discovery metadata published at /.well-known/aip-registry. This document identifies the Registry service and points verifiers to the current Registry Trust Record.

registry_id.description: Stable HTTPS identifier for the Registry service.

aip_version.description: AIP version implemented by this Registry.

registry_trust_uri.description: URI of the current Registry Trust Record.

endpoints.description: Service endpoints published by the Registry. Values may be relative or absolute URIs.

oauth_authorization_server.description: OPTIONAL. URI of the OAuth authorization server metadata.

identity_proofing_required_for_tier2.description: OPTIONAL. Whether this Registry requires G3 for Tier 2 operations.
